chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-341 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 1251/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No. 1252/2025 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. ------ 23.04.2025 Mr. Rashid Ali Tunio, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks following relief: a). That this Hon’ble Court may be pleased to direct the respondents No.6/Circle Officer, P.S. Anti-Corruption, Kamber-Shahadadkot to conduct enquiry against the respondents No.1 to 5 and 7 to 10 in respect of issuance of false Fard/Sale Certificate in respect of petitioner’s landed property bearing survey Nos.58, 2-35 acres, and No.59, area 09-18 acres, (total area 12-13 acres), situated in Deh and Tapo Sijawal, Taluka Sijawal Junejo, District Kamber- Shahadadkot at Kamber as well as manipulated and bogus sale deed to be executed before respondent No.10/Sub-Registrar, Sijawal, on payment of bribe money of Rs, One Million by respondents No.1 to 5 to respondents No.7 to 10 and on conclusion of such enquiry legal proceedings be initiated against all the delinquents involved in such fraud. b). To direct the respondents No.7 to 10 not to entertain any sale/purchase transaction in respect of petitioner’s landed property bearing survey Nos.58, 2-35 acres, and No.59, area 09-18 acres (total area 12-13 acres) situated in Deh and Tapo Sijawal, Taluka Sijawal Junejo, District Kamber-Shahadadkot at Kamber, by the respondent No.1 in favour of respondents No.2 to 5 or anyone else; c).

Anti-Corruption, Kamber-Shahadadkot to conduct enquiry against the respondents No.1 to 5 and 7 to 10 in respect of issuance of false Fard/Sale Certificate in respect of petitioner’s landed property bearing survey Nos.58, 2-35 acres, and No.59, area 09-18 acres, (total area 12-13 acres), situated in Deh and Tapo Sijawal, Taluka Sijawal Junejo, District Kamber- Shahadadkot at Kamber as well as manipulated and bogus sale deed to be executed before respondent No.10/Sub-Registrar, Sijawal, on payment of bribe money of Rs, One Million by respondents No.1 to 5 to respondents No.7 to 10 and on conclusion of such enquiry legal proceedings be initiated against all the delinquents involved in such fraud. b). To direct the respondents No.7 to 10 not to entertain any sale/purchase transaction in respect of petitioner’s landed property bearing survey Nos.58, 2-35 acres, and No.59, area 09-18 acres (total area 12-13 acres) situated in Deh and Tapo Sijawal, Taluka Sijawal Junejo, District Kamber-Shahadadkot at Kamber, by the respondent No.1 in favour of respondents No.2 to 5 or anyone else; c). Award costs of the petition. d). Any other equitable relief, which this Hon’ble Court deems fit and proper under the circumstances of the case.” Together with this petition, the petitioner has annexed copy of Registered Sale Deed, available at page 25 of the Court file, which depicts photographs of the petitioner as well respondent No.1, who are real brothers and per document it appears that land in question has been sold out by them; however, by filing this petition they indirectly seek its cancellation, which without recording of evidence cannot be done. As far as evidence is concerned, this Court lacks jurisdiction of recording evidence being barred by Article 212 of the Constitution, Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Consequently, the petition being devoid of merits is hereby dismissed in limine alongwith the listed applications. Judge Judge Manzoor
